subcodes.title: Words spoken at table on 1914-10-30
subcodes.first_line: Consider how the people bear testimony to the fact that this Religion is universal and its principles are conducive to the welfare of humanity
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @unity; oneness of humanity, @universal peace; world unity, @universality of the Cause, @rejection of Muhammad, @suffering; rejection of Christ
